title: QLV Artificial Snow Spray for Christmas Decorations - 2 Pack of 200ml Fake Snow Spray for Christmas Tree Decorations And Wreath Making - Festive Xmas Window Artificial Snow for Crafts
features: CREATE A WINTER WONDERLAND - Transform your space with our artificial snow spray for tree, perfect for decorating Christmas trees, wreaths, and table settings, adds a festive snowy touch to any décor, and lets you create a magical winter atmosphere easily and effortlessly for any holiday setup

PERFECT FOR CRAFTING PROJECTS - Ideal for DIY holiday crafts, this Christmas snow helps create snowy blankets on ornaments, wood, and other surfaces, adding a frosty texture to every project, enhancing your Christmas décor with a realistic snowy effect and festive charm

EASY-TO-USE SPRAY APPLICATION - Each 200ml can of Christmas tree spray snow provides a high-quality and quick application, making it simple to add a wintry touch to Christmas décor, whether used alone or paired with glitter sprays, metallic paints, or other festive sprays for a custom look

VERSATILE DECORATING OPTION - Add a unique touch to windows, table settings, or Christmas trees, this snow spray for window art works wonderfully with glitter glue or metallic spray paint, allowing you to customize each decoration with a touch of frost for a truly enchanting winter setup

LONG-LASTING SNOW EFFECT - Each 200ml spray snow in a can provides a lasting snow effect that won’t fade, allowing you to enjoy a frosty look all season long, perfect for holiday parties or creating a festive ambiance, delivering the ultimate in snow-inspired decorating versatility
